title: Barbacoa Beef Tacos
description: A flavorful and tender beef barbacoa recipe, served in a crunchy taco shell with fresh cilantro and a squeeze of lime. This recipe is perfect for a weeknight dinner or a party with friends.
instructions: In a large Dutch oven, combine beef chunks, fennel bulb, onion, and barbacoa seasoning.
Pour in tangy BBQ sauce and cumin. Mix well to combine.
Cover the pot with a lid and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Braise the beef for 2 1/2 hours, or until it is tender and easily shreds with a fork.
Remove the pot from the oven and let it cool slightly.
Shred the beef with two forks and stir in some of the juices.
Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble tacos by spooning beef onto a tortilla, topping with cheese, and serving with a lime wedge and a sprinkle of cilantro.
